<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Powder for concentrate for solution for infusion: Cresemba is indicated in patients from 1 year of age and older for the treatment of  invasive aspergillosis mucormycosis in patients for whom...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>

<li>pulmonary hypertension（98.1%）</li>

<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（97.3%）</li>

<li>ulerythema ophryogenesis（97.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
